There are **two `DocumentDetail` interfaces** in the codebase:

---

### 1. `src/types/legal.ts:224` — Public/API-facing type (primary)

Extends `DocumentSummary` (lines 171–207). Full flattened field list:

**From `DocumentSummary`:**
```typescript
id: string
category: DocumentCategory
subtype: ContractSubtype | null
title: string
description: string | null
status: DocumentStatus
analysisStatus: AnalysisStatus
analysisEnabled: boolean
effectiveDate: Date | null
expirationDate: Date | null
tags: string[]
createdAt: Date
updatedAt: Date
client: { id: string; name: string } | null
clientName: string | null
jurisdiction: { id: string; code: string; name: string } | null
legalEntity: {
  id: string
  name: string
  shortName: string | null
  jurisdiction: { id: string; code: string; name: string } | null
} | null
currentVersion: DocumentVersionInfo | null  // { id, versionNumber, originalFilename, fileType, fileSize, createdAt, createdByUserId }
riskSummary: { critical: number; high: number; medium: number; low: number; total: number } | null
_count: { versions: number; risks: number; comments: number }
```

**Additional fields on `DocumentDetail`:**
```typescript

Has all `LegalDocument` Prisma fields (id, workspaceId, category, subtype, clientId, legalEntityId, jurisdictionId, title, description, reference, externalRef, status, currentVersionId, effectiveDate, expirationDate, reviewDueDate, signedDate, analysisEnabled, analysisStatus, analyzedAt, analysisCredits, totalInputTokens, totalOutputTokens, estimatedCostUsd, parentDocumentId, relatedToId, tags, customFields, retentionOverride, retentionReason, visibility, archivedAt, createdByUserId, createdAt, updatedAt) **plus**:

**Answer:**

**File:** `src/lib/services/risk/risk.service.ts`, lines 20–70

**Full function signature:**

```typescript
async function createRisk(
  documentId: string,
  workspaceId: string,
  input: CreateRiskInput,
  user: User
): Promise<RiskItem>
```

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Notes |
|-----------|------|-------|
| `documentId` | `string` | ID of the legal document to attach the risk to |
| `workspaceId` | `string` | Workspace ownership check |
| `input` | `CreateRiskInput` | Risk payload (title, description, category, subcategory, severity, section, textExcerpt, recommendation, suggestedText, userProposedText, clientMotivation, internalComment) |
| `user` | `User` | Actor for audit logging |

**Return type:** `Promise<RiskItem>`

**Body summary:**
1. Verifies the document exists in the workspace via `LegalDocumentRepository.findSummary` (throws `DOCUMENT_NOT_FOUND` if not)
2. Optionally prefixes `internalComment` with a timestamp into `internalNotes`
3. Runs a `prisma.$transaction` — creates the risk via `RiskItemRepository.create` with `status: 'IDENTIFIED'`, then calls `createRiskAuditLog`
4. After the transaction: calls `checkPlaybookRules`, `queueRiskSync('add', risk.id)`, and `invalidateDocumentAnalytics(documentId)`
5. Returns the created `RiskItem`

## Answer

### Risk service files in `src/lib/services/risk/`

The risk service is split into 6 modules: `risk.service`, `risk-query.service`, `risk-status.service`, `risk-playbook.service`, `risk-audit.service`, `risk-notification.service`, plus `risk.types`.

---

### Production files importing from the risk service

| File | Imports |
|------|---------|
| `src/lib/cache/warm.ts` | `listRisks` from `risk-query.service` |
| `src/app/(main)/documents/[id]/summary/page.tsx` | `listRisks` from `risk-query.service` |
| `src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[workspaceId]/documents/[documentId]/risks/route.ts` | `createRisk` from `risk.service`; `listRisks` from `risk-query.service` |
| `src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[workspaceId]/documents/[documentId]/risks/[riskId]/route.ts` | `getRiskById` from `risk-query.service`; `updateRiskStatus` from `risk-status.service` |
| `src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[workspaceId]/documents/[documentId]/risks/[riskId]/accept/route.ts` | `acceptRisk` from `risk-status.service` |
| `src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[workspaceId]/documents/[documentId]/risks/[riskId]/escalate/route.ts` | `escalateRisk` from `risk-status.service` |
| `src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[workspaceId]/documents/[documentId]/risks/[riskId]/resolve/route.ts` | `resolveRisk` from `risk-status.service` |
| `src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[workspaceId]/playbook/route.ts` | `createPlaybookRule`, `listPlaybookRules` from `playbook.service` |
| `src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[workspaceId]/playbook/[ruleId]/route.ts` | `getPlaybookRuleById`, `updatePlaybookRule`, `deletePlaybookRule` from `playbook.service` |
| `src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[workspaceId]/playbook/[ruleId]/test/route.ts` | `testPlaybookRule` from `playbook.service` |
